'''Rutt''' was the loyal [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] servant of [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] business magnate [[Tyro Viveca/Legends|Tyro Viveca]], and also assisted him in his hunting excursions on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]]. Rutt was [[Death/Legends|killed]] on a hunt in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] after he was attacked on Viveca's [[Palisade]] estate by a [[Unidentified Lamproid (Kabal)|female]] [[Lamproid/Legends|Florn Lamproid]].<ref name="FP" />
